product_overview: An integrated web platform combining AI-powered design tools with print-on-demand services, digital and physical product sales, and comprehensive user and admin management, built on Next.js, TypeScript, and Supabase.
core_goals: Provide seamless user authentication and role-based access control.
Enable users to create AI-generated designs such as images, logos, and fonts.
Support a wide range of print services including digital printing, large format, and event stands.
Manage a diverse product catalog with configurable products.
Facilitate smooth shopping cart and checkout experiences with multi-gateway payment support.
Offer comprehensive order processing and tracking for users and admins.
Provide robust administrative tools for managing all aspects of the platform.
Support digital product downloads and interactive product customization.
Allow users to request and manage custom order quotes.
Deliver a responsive and accessible UI using modern design frameworks.
key_features: Complete authentication system with Supabase including login, registration, password reset, and role-based access control.
AI Studio offering image, logo, and font generation powered by OpenAI API.
Print services covering digital printing, large format prints, and event stands.
Product management with catalog browsing, individual product pages, and configurations.
Shopping cart functionality for physical and digital products with context management.
Multi-gateway payment processing supporting PayPal and Wompi including 3DS authentication.
Order management system with detailed order views and tracking.
Checkout process supporting both standard and simplified flows.
Administrative dashboard to manage orders, products, users, payments, transactions, email settings, and quotes.
User dashboard for managing personal orders, designs, and account details.
Digital product management with download capabilities.
Interactive design editor for customizing products before purchase.
Quote request system for custom orders with backend integration.
Responsive main navigation and reusable UI components based on Radix UI and Tailwind CSS.
Email service integration for notifications and communications.
Internationalization supporting English and Spanish languages.
user_flow_summary: Users register or log in via Supabase authentication system.
Users browse the product catalog and view detailed product pages.
Users use AI Studio to generate custom images, logos, or fonts for their designs.
Users add physical or digital products to their shopping cart.
Users proceed through checkout selecting preferred payment gateway (PayPal or Wompi).
Users receive order confirmation and track orders via user dashboard.
Admins log into the admin dashboard to manage orders, products, users, payments, and system settings.
Users can request quotes for custom orders through the quote system.
Users download digital products after purchase from their dashboard.
Users customize products using the interactive design editor before purchase.
validation_criteria: All user authentication flows (login, registration, password reset) function correctly with role-based access.
AI Studio features generate appropriate design assets using OpenAI API responses.
Print services are accurately listed and selectable with proper product information.
Product catalog displays correctly with individual product detail and configuration options.
Shopping cart manages physical and digital products accurately, reflecting correct totals.
Payment processing completes successfully with both PayPal and Wompi, including 3DS authentication.
Order management allows users and admins to view and track orders with up-to-date statuses.
Checkout process completes without errors in both normal and simplified modes.
Admin dashboard interfaces operate correctly for all management views and updates.
User dashboards correctly display user details, orders, and designs.
Digital product downloads are accessible and secure post-purchase.
Design editor functions allow product customization and preview before checkout.
Quote requests can be submitted, reviewed, and managed through the system.
UI components are responsive and accessible across devices.
Internationalization toggles between supported languages with correct translations.
Email notifications trigger appropriately for key user and system events.
